/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcobot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libcobot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/cobot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/cobot_interfaces/msg/observation__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/brian/Projects/Cobot/ros2_cobot/build/cobot_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libcobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
